---
title: "The dissemination of science news in social media platforms during the COVID-19 crisis: Characteristics and selection criteria"
author: "Maniou, Th., and Papa, V."
date: 2023-01-01
description: "Communication & Society"
doi: "10.15581/003.36.1.35-46"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---

**Link:** [https://doi.org/10.15581/003.36.1.35-46](https://doi.org/10.15581/003.36.1.35-46)
